goals.title: inspect
goals.objective: Confirm current Hero architecture, asset paths, and build/test gates
goals.evidence: Read HeroPortal, BrandCarousel, BrandCard, useBrandCarousel, heroAnimations, HeroGlassStage, HeroSmokeShader, brands, globals, package scripts. Confirmed current Hero uses WebGL stage/smoke while CSS BrandCard exists but is not used in Hero; checks are pnpm lint/typecheck/build.

goals.title: implement
goals.objective: Replace WebGL hero with CSS 3D card stage, floor reflection, and brand imagery
goals.evidence: Replaced Three.js HeroGlassStage and HeroSmokeShader with CSS 3D BrandCard rendering, CSS mist, floor contact shadow/reflection layers, generated and connected three optimized JPEG card images, removed /card-shadow-test route and three dependencies. pnpm lint and pnpm typecheck passed.

goals.title: verify
goals.objective: Run lint/typecheck/build and browser visual checks
goals.evidence: Final verification passed: pnpm lint, pnpm typecheck, and pnpm build succeeded; browser shows 3 ready image cards, 3 floor contacts, 3 reflections, 0 canvas elements, no card-shadow route anchor, click ROTI CAMP changes active state to 01/03 center, mobile 390x844 keeps 3 visible cards and hides nav links, fresh console errors empty. Dev server restarted on http://127.0.0.1:3001.
goals.verify_cmd: pnpm lint; pnpm typecheck; pnpm build; browser DOM/click/mobile checks
goals.verify_evidence: lint/typecheck/build exit 0; build route only / and /_not-found with First Load JS 105 kB; screenshots saved in qa-screenshots/roti-hero-implementation-2026-07-04; final browser report freshConsoleErrors=[]
